StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT MIN(cn.name) AS company_name, MIN(lt.link) AS link_type, MIN(t.title) AS western_follow_up FROM job.company_name AS cn, job.company_type AS ct, job.keyword AS k, job.link_type AS lt, job.movie_companies AS mc, job.movie_info AS mi, job.movie_keyword AS mk, job.movie_link AS ml, job.title AS t WHERE cn.country_code !='[pl]' AND (cn.name LIKE '%Film%' OR cn.name LIKE '%Warner%') AND ct.kind ='production companies' AND k.keyword ='sequel' AND lt.link LIKE '%follow%' AND mc.note IS NULL AND mi.info IN ('Sweden', 'Norway', 'Germany', 'Denmark', 'Swedish', 'Denish', 'Norwegian', 'German', 'English') AND t.production_year BETWEEN 1950 AND 2010 AND lt.id = ml.link_type_id AND ml.movie_id = t.id AND t.id = mk.movie_id AND mk.keyword_id = k.id AND t.id = mc.movie_id AND mc.company_type_id = ct.id AND mc.company_id = cn.id AND mi.movie_id = t.id AND ml.movie_id = mk.movie_id AND ml.movie_id = mc.movie_id AND mk.movie_id = mc.movie_id AND ml.movie_id = mi.movie_id AND mk.movie_id = mi.movie_id AND mc.movie_id = mi.movie_id

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: ([dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Denish' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Denmark' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='English' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='German' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Germany' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Norway' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Norwegian' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Sweden' OR [dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[info] as [mi].[info]='Swedish') AND PROBE([Opt_Bitmap1664],[dbprove].[job].[movie_info].[movie_id] as [mi].[movie_id])

[dbprove].[job].[movie_companies].[note] as [mc].[note] IS NULL AND PROBE([Opt_Bitmap1665],[dbprove].[job].[movie_companies].[movie_id] as [mc].[movie_id]) AND PROBE([Opt_Bitmap1666],[dbprove].[job].[movie_companies].[company_type_id] as [mc].[company_type_id])

([dbprove].[job].[company_name].[name] as [cn].[name] like '%Film%' OR [dbprove].[job].[company_name].[name] as [cn].[name] like '%Warner%') AND [dbprove].[job].[company_name].[country_code] as [cn].[country_code]<>'[pl]'
